nodes.name: checklist-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for generating feature checklists via the /speckit-checklist command. Defines sample categories, numbered checklist items (CHK001-CHK006), and usage notes for tracking completion.

nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for defining a project constitution with 5 core principles, additional constraint sections, and governance rules. Used by /speckit-constitution to establish project-level non-negotiable standards.

nodes.name: plan-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for implementation plans generated by /speckit-plan. Covers technical context, constitution compliance gate, project structure options (single/web/mobile), and complexity tracking. Takes spec.md as input.

nodes.name: spec-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for feature specifications generated by /speckit-specify. Defines prioritized user stories (P1-P3) with acceptance scenarios, functional requirements (FR-001+), key entities, success criteria, and assumptions.

nodes.name: tasks-template.md
nodes.summary: Template for actionable task lists generated by /speckit-tasks. Organizes work into phases (Setup, Foundational, User Stories 1-3, Polish) with dependency ordering, parallel execution guidance, and MVP-first incremental delivery strategy.

edges.description: Checklist template references spec.md as input for feature requirements
Checklist template references plan.md as input for technical context
Checklist template references tasks.md as input for implementation details
Plan template takes spec.md as its primary input and references it as the feature specification source
Plan template includes a Constitution Check gate that validates against constitution principles
Tasks template lists plan.md as a required prerequisite and references its structure decisions
Tasks template lists spec.md as a required prerequisite and organizes tasks by user story from the spec
